signals.npcLine: Crypto pulse weakening; shadows grow longer in digital bazaars.
signals.questPulse: Seek stability amid crashing market echoes; trust is scarce.
signals.worldFeed: Market cap bleeds, fear grips neon-lit exchanges.
signals.clueEvent: Whispers of failing tokens rise in underground forums.

signals.npcLine: AI-driven trades spike; algorithms hunting whales tonight.
signals.questPulse: Infiltrate server nodes to decode stealth trading patterns.
signals.worldFeed: Automated agents tilt market scales, risking chaos.
signals.clueEvent: Data streams reveal suspicious AI market plays.

signals.npcLine: PENGU asset chatter heats up; could be heat or hype.
signals.questPulse: Track viral spikes and shadow brokers pushing pengu tokens.
signals.worldFeed: Rogue cryptos gain traction against the fading sun.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted chats hint at rising digital penguin cult.

signals.npcLine: PLUME syndicate spreads like smog; trace their influence.
signals.questPulse: Uncover hidden cartel investments in fragmented markets.
signals.worldFeed: Shadow factions manipulate faint market signals.
signals.clueEvent: Messages intercepted: PLUME fingerprints on recent hacks.

signals.npcLine: PROS agents vanish; rumors say they’re caught in crossfire.
signals.questPulse: Find missing brokers tangled in market warfare.
signals.worldFeed: Silent silos hold secrets of last PROS moves.
signals.clueEvent: Cold trails suggest coverup in high-stakes trades.
